children.heading: National Technical Institute for the Deaf
children.label: b National Technical Institute for the Deaf
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2009 through 2014 to carry out the provisions of subchapter I and this subchapter relating to the National Technical Institute for the Deaf.
